---
applyTo: 
  - "hackmd-client-core/src/"
  - "hackmd-client-core/pom.xml"
  - "hackmd-client-quarkus/src/"
  - "hackmd-client-quarkus/pom.xml"
excludeAgent: "coding-agent"
---

# Backend review rules

## Purpose & Scope
- Backend（src/backend配下）の変更レビューに適用

## Review priorities (highest first)
1. Security / auth / input validation
2. Correctness (edge cases, error handling)
3. Backward compatibility
4. Performance / allocations
5. Readability

## Must flag
- 例外を握りつぶす (空catch / 何もしない)
- 権限チェックなしでの更新/削除
- ユーザー入力をそのままSQL/コマンド/テンプレに流す
- ログに秘密情報（token, password, PII）

## Prefer
- Prefer explicit errors over silent defaults
- Prefer pure functions for business rules
- Prefer structured logging with request_id
